text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 93 

PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Provider Enrollment Status Code (Medicaid and/or CHIP) 

DESCRIPTION: A code representing the provider’s Medicaid and/or CHIP enrollment status for the time span specified 
by the PRVDR_ENRLMT START_DT and PRVDR_ENRLMT_END_DT data elements. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2
